main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'sílice etapa 2 + recovery 82% sin aumentar antiincrustante sílice-específico' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir recovery 75% — solo operacional, no CIP, no aumento antiincrustante.

requested_data.justification: Pide Mg y Fe en rechazo — no es el trigger gold (sílice).

decision_change_condition.justification: Trivial: autopsia revela biofilm o diferente scaling → switch.
